# Live verification on test-cluster-b: BYO custom MCP server hosting (#394)
# The ksvc was generated by buildCustomServerDeployment() and applied to the cluster as-is.

manifest: kind=Service name=mcp-s1, label in-falcone.io/component=mcp-server, min-scale=0,
          non-root securityContext (runAsNonRoot, no privesc, drop ALL, RuntimeDefault)
deploy:   ksvc Ready; pod carries in-falcone.io/component=mcp-server
          (the label the #388 NetworkPolicy selects -> internal-only)
invoke:   INIT  -> protocolVersion 2025-11-25, serverInfo.tenant=ten-custom-byo (env injected)
          CALL  -> tools/call tenant_info => "tenant=ten-custom-byo"
teardown: namespace deleted (no residue)

Conclusion: a tenant-provided image is hosted as an internal-only, scale-to-zero MCP-server ksvc
via the deploy-spec builder, and serves MCP. BYO custom hosting works end to end.
